response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with strong mentoring skills and distributed systems experience. However, he falls significantly short of the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming, having only used it briefly at National Instruments and for a university thesis. Additionally, his background leans heavily towards full-stack web and application development rather than the deep cloud compute platform, storage, and hardware architecture focus required for this role.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience with a strong focus on software craftsmanship and CI/CD.
Proven mentoring and leadership capabilities, evidenced by organizing technical workshops and dojos.
Experience building high-throughput distributed systems handling millions of requests per second.
concerns: Fails to meet the minimum qualification of 8 years of C++ programming (has less than 1 year).
Background is heavily focused on full-stack web rather than low-level cloud compute or hardware architecture.
Lacks direct experience leading the technical strategy for an internal cloud compute platform.
